title: vinv
description: Lightweight data standard for individual tree based forest management, visualisation & analytics

coordinates.title: Coordinates
coordinates.description: Anchor point of the Object on a map. Array of longitude, latitude and [altitude] coordinate. Reference system: WGS84 Web Mercator with longitude and latitude units of decimal degrees.

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: The decimal east–west position of a point. (7 decimal places max)

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: The decimal north–south position of a point. (7 decimal places max)

altitude.title: [Altitude]
altitude.description: The altitude of the position in meters above mean sea level. (2 decimal places max)

accuracy.title: Accuracy
accuracy.description: The decimal accuracy of coordinates in meter (2 decimal places max).

species.title: Tree species
species.description: Tree Species values taken from https://github.com/b-lack/tree-species

items.title: Diameter at height
items.description: Array including height and diameter at height

height.title: Height
height.description: Height of tree in PERCENT where diameter is measured

diameter.title: Diameter
diameter.description: Diameter in CENTIMETER at measured height

items.title: Diameter at height
items.description: Array including height and diameter at height

height.title: Height
height.description: Height of tree in PERCENT where diameter is measured

diameter.title: Diameter
diameter.description: Diameter in CENTIMETER at measured height

image.title: Images
image.description: List of absolute or relative path to file

items.title: Images
items.description: A universal resource identifier (URI), according to RFC3986.

changedAt.title: Time of Change
changedAt.description: Date and time when change happened.
